title: Slimes SMP Forever World
description: This is the modpack to be used on the Slimes SMP server. This pack includes the Create mod, Simple Voice Chat, and lots of performance optimization mods to smooth the experience!
body:
This is the modpack to be used on the Slimes SMP server. This pack includes the Create mod, Simple Voice Chat, and lots of performance optimization mods to smooth the experience!
### The most important mods are as follows:
- Create
- Create: Copycats+
- Sodium
- Iris Shaders
- Miniature Shaders Pack
- Simple Voice Chat
- Camerapture
- Mouse Tweaks
- Sound Physics Remastered
### All of these mods are designed to give the player an optimal, create-mod-infused online experience on the Slimes SMP server. 
This modpack enhances the Minecraft experience with immersive visuals, intuitive controls, and powerful automation tools. At its core is the Create mod, offering complex mechanical systems and automation, expanded further by Create: Copycats+. Visual performance is boosted with Sodium and Iris Shaders, delivering smooth gameplay and stunning lighting. Sound Physics Remastered brings realistic acoustics to caves, structures, and open environments. Communication is made seamless with Simple Voice Chat, while Mouse Tweaks and Camerapture streamline inventory management and in-game content creation. Whether you're an engineer, builder, or adventurer, this pack makes Minecraft more dynamic, beautiful, and interactive.
